reasoning_content: I need to update main.cpp to output "Hello, YatCC!" and then check whether the build directory exists and look at what's in the test folder.

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && ls test/ && ls build/ 2>/dev/null | head -30

tool_call.name: terminal
